title: Policy
description: An IAM policy for a Cloud Storage resource.

kind.description: The kind of item this is.

resourceId.description: The ID of the resource to which this policy belongs.

version.description: The version of the policy. Valid values are 1 and 3. Any request that specifies conditional role bindings must specify version 3.

etag.description: HTTP 1.1 Entity tag for the policy. Used for optimistic concurrency control.

bindings.description: A list of members bound to a role.
